summary: Well-organized unit tests covering core parsing/aggregation functions (JUnit, JSON, flaky detection, markdown generation) with clear fixtures and good naming. However, missing direct tests for Invoke-Main, Get-AllTestResults, and Get-TestResults entry points. Edge case coverage is limited: no tests for malformed XML/JSON, invalid field values, special characters in test names/messages, empty collections, or extreme values. The separate act integration harness helps but isn't part of this unit test suite. Would catch regressions in happy-path logic but miss edge cases and error conditions.
